flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northwood Technical College fell 19% between 2006 and 2009 (53.0% → 43.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northwood Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Northwood Technical College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (67.2% → 79.9%).
